validated_commands.lint_check: python3 -m ruff check src/ tests/ && python3 -m ruff format --check src/ tests/
validated_commands.lint_fix: python3 -m ruff check src/ tests/ --fix && python3 -m ruff format src/ tests/

env_notes: PyPy 3.10 env -- use pip install -e .[dev] + python3 -m pytest. uv not on PATH in runner.

infrastructure_notes: conftest.py, tests/fixtures/, tests/utils/ all present. Solid infrastructure. No major gaps.
testing_notes: Rich emits ANSI codes (ESC=0x1B, category Cc) that trip the _ascii_only control-char guard. Fix: strip with re.compile(r'\x1b\[[0-9;]*[a-zA-Z]') before per-char loop.
